Home › Industries
9 verticals shipped · 6 anchored by named case studies

Industries we ship production software for. Every vertical, a real client.

Six primary verticals where we’ve put production platforms in front of real users — each anchored by a named case study you can read today. Plus six additional industries where we’ve shipped mobile, marketplace, or SaaS work over 15+ years. No category we list is theoretical.

Browse Verticals See 5 production case studies →

Primary Verticals

Six industries where we have shipped — and you can name the client.

If you’re in one of these six, you’re not hiring us to learn your industry. We’re already there. Every card below links to a production case study and the matching service offering.

Healthcare & HIPAA SaaS

Multi-tenant healthcare platforms with EVV, AI document intelligence, voice-to-text clinical notes, and HIPAA-architected isolation.

  • Adult home-care SaaS in production for a US healthcare operator
  • Schema-per-tenant isolation, audit logs, BAA-ready
  • Voice notes, predictive scheduling, risk detection
Proof: Adult Home Care SaaS case study →
Healthcare SaaS service →

Banking, Fintech & Compliance

Central-bank-grade enterprise systems: case tracking, document management, audit logs, role-based access, regulatory workflow.

  • Litigation Management System for Nepal Rastra Bank (central bank)
  • Compliance-as-architecture: every action logged, every actor authenticated
  • PHP 8 / Laravel 9 / MySQL 8 stack — chosen for procurement-team familiarity
Proof: Nepal Rastra Bank case study →
Banking & fintech service →

Procurement & Enterprise SaaS

Real-time digital negotiation platforms supporting reverse, forward, and hybrid bidding. Multi-tenant SaaS for European procurement teams.

  • DiNePa: live procurement SaaS for European enterprises
  • Built to handle 80 concurrent suppliers per tender
  • Multi-tenant schema isolation, GDPR-architected
Proof: DiNePa case study →
SaaS development service →

Real Estate & PropTech

Multi-class property marketplaces — houses, condos, townhouses, commercial, lots, agricultural land — with region-first search and bank-partner integrations.

  • MSG Homes: live across Cavite + Palawan, Philippines
  • 6 property types, 6 major bank partners, buy/sell/rent tri-modal
  • Region-first search ranking, OAuth-first account flow
Proof: MSG Homes case study →
Real estate engineering →

On-Demand Marketplaces

Dual-sided iOS, Android, and web marketplaces with native search, real-time booking state machines, and provider-conversion onboarding flows.

  • Upkeep.pro: 500K+ daily bookings, 10K+ professionals worldwide
  • Native Swift + Kotlin + React + Node.js + PostgreSQL
  • Sub-second search, push-delivery confirmation, Stripe payments
Proof: Upkeep.pro case study →
Mobile development service →
Specialty · 15-year track record

Auction & Negotiation Platforms

Penny, lowest-unique-bid, price-reveal, reverse, Dutch, eBay-style, SMS bidding, syndication — the bidding patterns we’ve shipped across 11+ countries since 2011.

  • 40+ auction platforms in production: bidbid.co.uk (Node.js), prezzocorrente (Italy), TopEncheres (France), uBiduBuy (Singapore), and more
  • Every bidding pattern: highest, lowest-unique, reverse, Dutch, penny, hybrid
  • Built to handle peak-tender concurrency without race conditions
Proof: bidbid.co.uk — live production platform →
Auction software pillar →

Also delivered in

Six more verticals where we’ve shipped real software.

No case study page yet, but each has a real production deployment from our portfolio of hundreds of projects.

Energy & IoT

Energy consumption monitoring & analytics application with device-level telemetry.

Shipped: Energyly

Logistics & On-Demand Dispatch

Goods delivery service mobile app with route management and live tracking.

Shipped: RabbitDispatch

Public Safety & Mass Notification

Incident reporting + mass alert systems for disaster management and public-safety teams.

Shipped: Zippy Alert & Alacer

Media & Live Streaming

Live video streaming platform with bandwidth optimisation and concurrent-viewer scaling.

Shipped: Jreamvision TV

Events Management

Multi-tenant event management application for conference, registration, and attendee operations.

Shipped: Leyline

D2C Subscription Commerce

Bodybuilding meal-delivery subscription platform with weekly fulfilment workflow.

Shipped: Lifter Life

Don’t see your industry?

Twelve named verticals doesn’t mean we only ship in twelve verticals. It means these are the ones with public proof. If your business model is custom software, multi-tenant SaaS, a mobile marketplace, or an enterprise compliance system — the architecture choices we’ve made for the verticals above transfer cleanly to yours. The shortest path to finding out is a 30-minute call with the founder.
